name: secedgar-mcp-server
description: Query SEC EDGAR filings, XBRL financials, and company data through MCP. STDIO & Streamable HTTP.

EDGAR_USER_AGENT.title: User-Agent (required)
EDGAR_USER_AGENT.description: User-Agent header for SEC compliance. Format: "AppName contact@email.com".

MCP_LOG_LEVEL.title: Log Level
MCP_LOG_LEVEL.description: Minimum log level for output (debug, info, warn, error).
